content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally across IT (+11%), FMCG, Capital Goods, Pharma, Auto, Chemicals — strong global cues (Nasdaq +2%) supporting risk-on. All 11 held positions are showing gains today with several already past or near targets. Priority is locking in gains via SL trailing on big movers, not adding new exposure.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24500,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 (+7.4% from entry 984). SL already at 1035 (above entry, BE+5%). Trail gap to CMP is ~2.1% — within 1% floor discipline. Q4 strong, NIM expansion. Hold to target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 (-0.8%). Macro hedge, MACD bearish crossover but holding above 20-SMA. SL 121 (-3.3%) intact. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 (+3.4% from entry 1700, just made fresh 52w high). SL already at 1735 = entry +2% locked. Trail gap ~1.3% — within 1% floor. Hold to 1820 target. Strong FY26 results."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4570.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 (+1.2% from entry 4575). SL 4570 nearly BE. Trail gap ~1.3%. Defense sector strong, new CMD catalyst. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 (+2.2% from entry 6900). SL 6960 = BE+0.9%. Trail gap to CMP is ~1.3% — meets 1% floor. Q4 EBITDA +80% YoY, specialty chemicals tailwind. Hold to target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 (+0.86% from entry 838). Big day +9.84% but giving back from high 862.70. Current SL 836 too tight (only 1.1% below CMP and below entry by 0.2%). Trail SL UP slightly to 820 — wait, 820 < 836 = LOOSER, would be rejected. Keeping SL at 836; this is HOLD effectively."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL 836 is +0.5% below entry but only 1.1% below CMP 845.20 — tight but within 1% floor. No tightening warranted yet given intraday volatility. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 (-0.08% vs entry 369). Made fresh 52w high 372.50, faded slightly. SL 365 already locked at -1.1% from entry. Trail gap to CMP 1.0% — at floor. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 (+0.31% from entry 820). Hit 52w high 843.15 today, faded. SL 815 (-0.6%) intact, trail gap 0.9% — at floor. Strong Q4, FY27 guidance bullish. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 (+1.6% from entry 1259, up 11% intraday on sector). SL 1260 = BE+0.08%. Trail gap to CMP 1.5% — adequate. IT sector outlier with strong Q4. Hold to 1330."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 (+0.3% from entry 3025). Defense rally +9.2%. SL 3000 (-0.83% from entry), trail gap 1.1%. Rs 33,000 cr corvette L1 catalyst. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 (+0.16% from entry 806). Gap-up +10.46% on Q4 results. SL 798 (-1% from entry). Trail gap 1.15% — at floor. Hold to target 855."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1035.00, "reasoning": "SL above entry, trail gap adequate."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 121.00, "reasoning": "Macro hedge, no thesis change."},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPORTS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1735.00, "reasoning": "SL locked at entry+2%, fresh 52w high."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 4570.00, "reasoning": "SL near BE, defense momentum intact."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 6960.00, "reasoning": "SL locked at BE+, Q4 strong."},
    {"symbol": "TITAGARH", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 836.00, "reasoning": "SL tight but within 1% floor; intraday volatility, do not micro-adjust."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 365.00, "reasoning": "SL at -1.1%, trail gap 1% — at floor, no change."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 815.00, "reasoning": "SL holds, FMCG leader on Q4 beat."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1260.00, "reasoning": "SL at BE, IT outlier post-Encora."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 3000.00, "reasoning": "SL near entry, defense L1 catalyst pending."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 798.00, "reasoning": "SL at -1%, Q4 highest-ever revenue."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BAJAJ-AUTO, POLYCAB, GABRIEL, M&M all show strong Q4 catalysts. Cooldown rules and existing book diversification considerations preclude new entries today — capital is heavily deployed across 11 positions and I want to see how the existing book closes the day before adding. NEULANDLAB has a binary May 12 results event — explicitly avoid new entry per rule 11. SRF would duplicate NAVINFLUOR's chemicals theme — cluster discipline. CANCEL the stale HFCL pending BUY @ 133.50 (placed 1917 minutes / ~32 hours ago, well past relevance — no longer in watchlist).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Portfolio is 80%+ deployed at soft-target with 11 positions, all CNC, well-diversified across Financials (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS), Defense/Capital Goods (HAL, GRSE, TITAGARH), FMCG (MARICO), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), IT (COFORGE), Logistics (ADANIPORTS), Macro hedge (GOLDBEES). Today is a strong tape (IT +11%, FMCG +5%, Auto +5%, Capital Goods +9%) — most positions are at small gains with SLs locked at or near breakeven. Discipline today is to LET WINNERS RUN to targets rather than chase new entries. Will reassess EOD for any positions that hit target or stall. The 5-day rolling win rate (14%) is poor — emphasizing patience and not adding fresh names until existing book proves the thesis."
}
